speaking.title: Speaking Part 3: Uncertain predictions
questions: Do you think life might change a lot in the future?
Might people work from home more often?
speaking.sampleAnswer: Yes, life might change a lot because of technology. Some jobs could be replaced by machines. People might work from home more often than before.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Wishes and decisions
questions: What do you want to do this year?
Have you decided to change anything in your life?
What do you hope to achieve?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I want to improve my English this year. Yes, I decided to study more every day. I hope to achieve a good score in my exam.
